name: Nodexo
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN106 Nodexo Compute (on-chain SubnetIdentitiesV3 netuid 106 = subnet_name "Nodexo", subnet_url nodexo.ai; re-keyed from netuid 27, which on-chain is "Team TBC"). Official browser-facing website, docs, and console surfaces are known, but simple Node/HEAD probes currently receive connection resets. The previously discovered source repository candidate currently returns 404 and is not promoted.

gap_notes: Official website/docs/console are browser-facing but currently reject simple machine probes with connection resets, so these surfaces are listed without recurring probe monitoring.
Common /docs, /api, /health, /openapi.json, and Swagger paths on nodexo.ai are not promoted because the origin rejects simple machine probes.
Previously discovered GitHub source repository candidates currently return 404.
No verified live source repository yet.
No verified machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger schema yet.
No verified safe public subnet API endpoint yet.
No verified standalone static data artifact yet.

surfaces.name: Nodexo website
surfaces.rate_limit_notes: Not probe-enabled because simple Node/HEAD probes currently receive connection resets from the origin.

surfaces.name: Nodexo docs
surfaces.rate_limit_notes: Not probe-enabled because simple Node/HEAD probes currently receive connection resets from the origin.

surfaces.name: Nodexo console
surfaces.rate_limit_notes: Not probe-enabled because simple Node/HEAD probes currently receive connection resets from the origin.
surfaces.notes: Official Nodexo console surface. Authentication may be required for account-specific workflows.

surfaces.name: Nodexo subnet source repository
surfaces.notes: Official Nodexo (SN106) miner/validator/CLI source repo under the github.com/nodexo-ai org linked from the project website.

surfaces.name: Nodexo inventory API
surfaces.notes: Public Nodexo (SN106) GPU marketplace inventory API. Returns live JSON offers with GPU model, VRAM, pricing (USDC/hour), availability, and reliability metrics. No auth required.
